summary: Iteration 97: EN 13241 (Gates) & EN 12453 (Automation) certification module - backend testing complete. All 14 pytest tests pass. Full CRUD lifecycle verified: create, read, update, PDF generation. Motorized gates correctly auto-populate 8 default risk analysis items. Commessa correctly updated with gate_cert_id and normativa_tipo=EN_13241.
critical_code_review_comments: Gate certification module correctly implements EN 13241 and EN 12453 standards
Default risk analysis (8 items R01-R08) auto-populates for motorized gates only
PDF generation uses WeasyPrint and works for all 4 document types: DoP, CE Label, Maintenance Register, CE Declaration
GET for nonexistent cert returns {certification: null} instead of 404 - proper design for frontend handling
Force tests: auto-compliance check available (< 400N dynamic, < 150N static)
seed_data_creation: Created gate certification for commessa NF-2026-000002 (com_bfb82e090373) with motorized config, 8 risk analysis items, 3 force tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Gate certification module working. Cert ID gate_abb5ad8a3a1e exists for commessa com_bfb82e090373 with full risk analysis and force tests. Commessa has normativa_tipo=EN_13241. Frontend GateCertificationPanel.js ready for UI testing when needed.

test_classes: TestGateCertificationCreate (2 tests) - create manual gate, duplicate returns 409
TestGateCertificationRead (2 tests) - get existing cert, get nonexistent returns null
TestGateCertificationUpdate (2 tests) - update to motorizzato with risk analysis, add force tests
TestGateCertificationPDFs (5 tests) - DoP, CE Label, Maintenance, CE Declaration PDFs, 404 for nonexistent
TestCommessaNormativaUpdate (1 test) - commessa has normativa_tipo EN_13241

tests_executed.results: PASS - Motorized gate auto-populates 8 risk items confirmed
verified: POST motorizzato without analisi_rischi → 8 default items auto-populated
Risk IDs: R01-R08 with correct descriptions
Risk items have presente=True/False based on type, conforme=False by default

features_verified: POST /api/gate-cert/ - creates gate certification with default risk analysis for motorized gates
GET /api/gate-cert/{commessa_id} - returns certification data or null
PUT /api/gate-cert/{cert_id} - updates certification fields including analisi_rischi and prove_forza
GET /api/gate-cert/{commessa_id}/dop-pdf - generates DoP PDF per EN 13241
GET /api/gate-cert/{commessa_id}/dichiarazione-ce-pdf - generates CE declaration PDF with risk analysis and force tests
Commessa.normativa_tipo set to EN_13241 on certification creation
